query: I just launched B0GKR3D7SZ three days ago, it's a leakproof tumbler in the Home & Kitchen category. I need to capitalize on the honeymoon window before it closes. Can you run the full campaign setup with product assessment, competition analysis, and a ramp schedule for "leakproof tumbler 40oz"?

My product B085DVHQ57 was on page 1 for "insulated water bottle with straw" but dropped to page 4 last month after a stockout. I need a re-ranking campaign, probably conservative profile with the 60-90 day recovery timeline. Walk me through the full assessment and strategy.
Quick campaign setup needed: B08CS95K8L, "nonstick frying pan 10 inch", 5 SFB per day, aggressive profile, 14 day launch. Skip the assessment and go straight to cost breakdown and execution.

I sell B09XS7JWHH (Sony headphones, ~$250) and want to know what it would cost to rank for "noise canceling headphones". Don't execute anything yet, just give me the full cost breakdown with SFB proceeds offset, ROI projection, and payback period.

I have a $300 budget for ranking B004U3Y8OM for "vitamin d3 softgels". It's a low-price consumable under $15. Work backward from my budget and show me 2-3 campaign options with different volume and duration tradeoffs.

I need to rank B0CF2DJHFQ for "fabric shaver rechargeable" on amazon.co.uk. I know SFB isn't available in the UK so it'll be ATC+PGV only. Set up the campaign with adjusted ratios for the UK marketplace.

I started a ranking campaign for B0GKR3D7SZ two weeks ago and want to check progress. Pull the campaign stats, show me current position vs baseline, and tell me if I should start the taper protocol or keep the current volume.

I want to expand B085DVHQ57 to a second keyword "best water bottle for gym". I already have an active campaign on "insulated water bottle with straw". Add this keyword with a separate ramp schedule, maybe weighted allocation since the first keyword is more important.

I'm launching a new product B0D3RKXMQJ next week in the supplements category. It's priced at $22 with zero reviews. Run the product assessment and tell me if there are any CRITICAL blockers before I start a ranking campaign, and what funnel profile makes sense.

My ranking campaign for B004U3Y8OM has been running for 30 days but position hasn't improved. The SFB:ATC:PGV ratio is 1:2:8 on standard profile. Can you run the troubleshooting diagnostic and check if I need to adjust the volume or switch profiles?

I sell a seasonal product B0BXYZ1234 (Christmas ornaments). Peak season is November-December. It's currently April. Should I start a ranking campaign now or wait? I want the full assessment with seasonality analysis and optimal timing recommendation.

Compare the cost of ranking B08CS95K8L for 3 different keywords: "nonstick frying pan", "ceramic frying pan", and "best frying pan for eggs". Give me individual cost breakdowns and a combined multi-keyword campaign estimate. I want to see which keyword gives the best ROI.

My wallet balance is running low and I have an active campaign on B0GKR3D7SZ with 5 days left. Check my current balance, calculate how much I need to finish the campaign, and generate a top-up link if there's a shortfall.
